Name: UCheckBox
Description:
The checkbox widget allows you to display a toggled state of 'unchecked', 'checked' and 
  'indeterminable.  You can use the checkbox for a classic checkbox, or as a toggle button,
  or as radio buttons.
  
   Single Child
   Toggle

Variables.Name: CheckedState
Variables.Description: Whether the check box is currently in a checked state

Variables.Name: CheckedStateDelegate
Variables.Description: A bindable delegate for the IsChecked.

Variables.Name: UncheckedImage_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Image to use when the checkbox is unchecked

Variables.Name: UncheckedHoveredImage_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Image to use when the checkbox is unchecked and hovered

Variables.Name: UncheckedPressedImage_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Image to use when the checkbox is unchecked and pressed

Variables.Name: CheckedImage_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Image to use when the checkbox is checked

Variables.Name: CheckedHoveredImage_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Image to use when the checkbox is checked and hovered

Variables.Name: CheckedPressedImage_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Image to use when the checkbox is checked and pressed

Variables.Name: UndeterminedImage_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Image to use when the checkbox is in an ambiguous state and hovered

Variables.Name: UndeterminedHoveredImage_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Image to use when the checkbox is checked and hovered

Variables.Name: UndeterminedPressedImage_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Image to use when the checkbox is in an ambiguous state and pressed

Variables.Name: HorizontalAlignment
Variables.Description: How the content of the toggle button should align within the given space

Variables.Name: Padding_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Spacing between the check box image and its content

Variables.Name: BorderBackgroundColor_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: The color of the background border

Variables.Name: IsFocusable
Variables.Description: Sometimes a button should only be mouse-clickable and never keyboard focusable.

Functions.Name: IsPressed
Functions.Description: Returns true if this button is currently pressed

Functions.Name: IsChecked
Functions.Description: Returns true if the checkbox is currently checked

Delegate.Name: OnCheckStateChanged
Delegate.Description: Called when the checked state has changed
